headline: ASCO26: Bispecific antibody and RET fusion-targeting assets garner attention in NSCLC
summary: While Summit’s Harmoni-6 results drew a mixed reaction, Eli Lilly’s positive Retvemo data was expanded its potential in adjuvant NSCLC.
